title: Run the SuperLiora QA bench phase
prompt: Run the real SuperLiora autonomous QA bench phase from the source checkout and verify that it produces a passing manifest plus benchmark summary.

args: const fs=require('node:fs'); const manifest=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('.superliora/evidence/liora-agent-bench/system-suite/qa-bench/manifest.json','utf8')); const summary=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('.superliora/evidence/liora-agent-bench/system-suite/qa-bench/bench/summary.json','utf8')); if (manifest.status !== 'bench-pass') throw new Error(`manifest status ${manifest.status}`); if (summary.status !== 'PASS') throw new Error(`bench phase status ${summary.status}`); if (summary.benchSummary?.metrics?.score !== 1) throw new Error('bench score did not reach 1');
